lesson.menu_title: Decisions and Offers — 'Will' for Spontaneous Choices in HR
lesson.menu_desc: Making decisions, offers, and promises at the moment of speaking with will -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- Decisions and Offers -- Will
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Murielle Xavier | Aula 14 -- Decisions and Offers

listenings.text: Hi Murielle, it's Ethan. I just heard that Sofia is sick and cannot run the interviews tomorrow. Do not worry, I will handle it. I will step in and lead the panel myself. I will confirm the room this afternoon, and I will notify the candidates right away. I promise I will not cancel anything. If you need extra support, just call me and I will come. I am reliable, and I will make sure everything runs smoothly. I will send you a short update tonight. Talk soon.

Good morning, Murielle. This is Diana from London. I want to reassure you about the audit next week. We are ready. I will arrange the documents today, and I will confirm the schedule with the directors. I guarantee that the team will cope well with the pressure. If a problem appears, I will notify you promptly. I will not leave you alone with this. I think the auditors will be satisfied, because we always prepare carefully. I will remind everyone about the meeting tomorrow morning. Thank you, and I will call you soon.
